title: Learning about space
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Our science teacher has started a new topic about space, and I am finding it really interesting. Last lesson, we learned (27) the planets and how they move around the sun. The teacher showed us a video which explained the topic more clearly (28) the textbook. I was especially interested in Mars because scientists hope people may travel there one day. During the lesson, we worked (29) pairs and answered questions together. My partner knew a lot, so I learned several new facts from him. At the end, the teacher asked us to write a short paragraph (30) what we had discovered. I found the task difficult at first, but it became easier (31) I looked at my notes. I would like to visit a science museum soon because I want to find (32) more about space.

questions.explanation: Paragraph on/about a topic; 'on' is accepted here.
